nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-crowned whitestart
nodes.summary: Yellow-crowned whitestart（Myioborus flavivertex）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-crowned whitestart。

nodes.name: Yellow-crowned whitestart
nodes.summary: The yellow-crowned whitestart (Myioborus flavivertex), Santa Marta whitestart or yellow-crowned redstart, is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to the highland forest and woodland in the Santa Marta Mountains in Colombia. References
